allow: Bash(git commit -q -m 'docs: add design doc, project instructions, build plan, decision log *)
Bash(npx -y shadcn@latest add button card badge separator input table breadcrumb popover skeleton)
Bash(git commit -q -m 'feat: scaffold Next.js app with bilingual shell \(ta default, en\) *)
Bash(git commit -q -m 'feat: initial core schema migration with enforced provenance *)

Bash(curl -sL -m 40 -G "https://query.wikidata.org/sparql" --data-urlencode "query=SELECT \(COUNT\(?item\) AS ?n\) WHERE { ?item wdt:P31 wd:Q77501151 }" --data-urlencode "format=json" -H "User-Agent: ArivomCivicData/0.1 \(civic data platform; contact via github\)")

Bash(curl -sL -m 60 -G "https://query.wikidata.org/sparql" --data-urlencode "query=SELECT \(COUNT\(?item\) AS ?n\) \(COUNT\(?d\) AS ?ndist\) \(COUNT\(?pc\) AS ?npc\) WHERE { ?item wdt:P31 wd:Q54375510 . OPTIONAL { ?item wdt:P131 ?d } OPTIONAL { ?item wdt:P361 ?pc } }" --data-urlencode "format=json" -H "User-Agent: ArivomCivicData/0.1")

Bash(curl -sL -m 60 -G "https://query.wikidata.org/sparql" --data-urlencode "query=SELECT \(COUNT\(DISTINCT ?item\) AS ?n\) \(COUNT\(DISTINCT ?ta\) AS ?nta\) \(COUNT\(?part\) AS ?nparts\) WHERE { ?item wdt:P31 wd:Q47481352 . ?item wdt:P131 wd:Q1445 . OPTIONAL { ?item rdfs:label ?ta FILTER\(LANG\(?ta\)='ta'\) } OPTIONAL { ?item wdt:P527 ?part } }" --data-urlencode "format=json" -H "User-Agent: ArivomCivicData/0.1")

Bash(curl -sL -m 60 -G "https://query.wikidata.org/sparql" --data-urlencode "query=SELECT \(COUNT\(DISTINCT ?item\) AS ?n\) \(COUNT\(DISTINCT ?ta\) AS ?nta\) WHERE { ?item wdt:P31 wd:Q10608197 . ?item wdt:P131 ?d . ?d wdt:P131 wd:Q1445 . OPTIONAL { ?item rdfs:label ?ta FILTER\(LANG\(?ta\)='ta'\) } }" --data-urlencode "format=json" -H "User-Agent: ArivomCivicData/0.1")

Bash(curl -sL -m 60 -G "https://query.wikidata.org/sparql" --data-urlencode "query=SELECT \(COUNT\(DISTINCT ?item\) AS ?n\) \(COUNT\(DISTINCT ?ta\) AS ?nta\) WHERE { ?item wdt:P31 wd:Q122987736 . OPTIONAL { ?item rdfs:label ?ta FILTER\(LANG\(?ta\)='ta'\) } }" --data-urlencode "format=json" -H "User-Agent: ArivomCivicData/0.1")

Bash(curl -sL -m 60 -G "https://query.wikidata.org/sparql" --data-urlencode "query=SELECT ?en ?ta WHERE { ?item wdt:P31 wd:Q47481352 ; wdt:P131 wd:Q1445 . ?item rdfs:label ?en FILTER\(LANG\(?en\)='en'\) FILTER\(CONTAINS\(LCASE\(?en\), 'thoo'\) || CONTAINS\(LCASE\(?en\), 'tuti'\)\) . OPTIONAL { ?item rdfs:label ?ta FILTER\(LANG\(?ta\)='ta'\) } }" --data-urlencode "format=json" -H "User-Agent: ArivomCivicData/0.1")

Bash(curl -sL -m 60 -G "https://query.wikidata.org/sparql" --data-urlencode "query=SELECT ?item ?en ?ta ?ord WHERE { ?item wdt:P31 wd:Q54375510 . OPTIONAL { ?item rdfs:label ?en FILTER\(LANG\(?en\)='en'\) } OPTIONAL { ?item rdfs:label ?ta FILTER\(LANG\(?ta\)='ta'\) } OPTIONAL { ?item wdt:P1545 ?ord } FILTER\(CONTAINS\(LCASE\(STR\(?en\)\), 'tiruvannamalai'\) || CONTAINS\(LCASE\(STR\(?en\)\), 'tirupattur'\) || CONTAINS\(LCASE\(STR\(?en\)\), 'tiruppattur'\) || CONTAINS\(LCASE\(STR\(?en\)\), 'singanallur'\)\) }" --data-urlencode "format=json" -H "User-Agent: ArivomCivicData/0.1")
Bash(git commit -q -m 'feat: bilingual constituency pages, provenance chips, methodology and freshness pages *)
Bash(git commit -q -m 'chore: CI workflows, README, AGPL-3.0 license, M1 wrap-up docs *)
